name: io.github.tim0-12432/HotkeylessAHK-mcp-skill
description: MCP server for Hotkeyless AHK HTTP API.

environmentVariables.description: The base URL of the Hotkeyless AHK HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: The timeout in milliseconds for requests to the server.
environmentVariables.name: TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: A comma-separated list of blacklisted commands.
environmentVariables.name: BLACKLIST

environmentVariables.description: The time-to-live in milliseconds for cached responses.
environmentVariables.name: CACHE_TTL_MS

environmentVariables.description: The default endpoint path for listing commands.
environmentVariables.name: ENDPOINT_LIST

environmentVariables.description: The default endpoint path for triggering commands.
environmentVariables.name: ENDPOINT_TRIGGER
